title: celtica gigantea subsp. gigantea
intro: Celtica gigantea subsp. gigantea, also known as the giant celtis or giant nettle tree, is a plant species within the Celtis genus. This deciduous tree is native to the Mediterranean region and is recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The leaves and bark of Celtica gigantea subsp. gigantea have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal benefits and provide relief from various health conditions.
